Update documentation: Add Real-CUGAN support and new features

Add Chinese localization for Real-CUGAN model names in Qt UI - Add display mapping for Real-CUGAN models (2倍/3倍/4倍, 保守/降噪1x/2x/3x/Pro) - Change denoise level labels from English to Chinese - Improve user experience for Chinese users

Fix Upscale Only mode by initializing ctx.img_colorized - Initialize ctx.img_colorized = ctx.input in Upscale Only mode - Makes flow consistent with batch/HQ processing - Remove defensive None checks in realcugan.py (no longer needed)

Add defensive checks for None images in Real-CUGAN upscaler - Skip None images in batch processing - Log errors when None images are encountered - Prevent AttributeError when processing invalid images

Fix Real-CUGAN architecture import by adding realcugan_arch module - Add manga_translator/upscaling/realcugan_arch/ with upcunet_v3.py model architecture - Simplify import using relative imports from realcugan_arch module - Remove debug logging - Fix incorrect path usage (models/ is for weights, not Python code)
Fix Real-CUGAN module import using BASE_PATH for correct path resolution
Add debug logging for Real-CUGAN module loading to diagnose import issues
Fix Real-CUGAN module import using importlib for more reliable loading

Fix Real-CUGAN model loading and download issues - Fix pro model state_dict wrapper structure - Fix model import path from models.RealCUGAN - Fix download logic to only download selected model instead of all models
Fix Real-CUGAN pro model loading issue - handle state_dict wrapper structure
